data.description: Check-in. You can register in person here if you haven't yet.
Riding outside the algorithm: bikes, data, and the cracks in techno‑feudalism
Draw your life in bikes. Draw a timeline of the meaningful bikes in your life. Please bring art supplies, and photos/memories of your bikes.

Oakland History Ride. 6pm meet, roll 6:15. Come learn and/or share!

Bike Library Program: Learn about this resource at one of Oakland's public libraries. Afterward we will ride to rock the bike together.
Frame bag creation with Bikepack the Bay. Please bring cardboard (for drafting patterns), vinyl/canvas to sew with, and velcro/zippers.

Open House at Rock the Bike: We're inventors and advocates building pedal powered blenders, generators, and more at a sweet workshop in Oakland, California, pushing the limits of bike culture. Our mission is to inspire people to make a real, lasting impact on the ongoing climate crisis through pedal powered event activities and products that prioritize health, wellness, education, and environmentalism.

East Bay Bike Party (EBBP) is a mobile party for riders of all ages, experience levels, and types to meet, ride, and play together in the streets. Rides are casual, with party stops at public spaces along a 10-15 mile route.
Breakfast and coffee
Community bench building - cutting and painting. The San Francisco Bay Area Bench Collective is a decentralized collaboration of local neighbors who build, install, and maintain much-needed benches.
Community Bike Shop Tour
Ride for palestine by Cycles of Change. 10am meet, 10:30am roll. Ride ends at the Bike!Bike! urban infrastructure and municipal code panel at noon.
Burner Bike Rehab. Ever wanted to learn how to bring a bicycle back from the dead? Nothing kills a bike faster than the dust from burningman, learn the steps involved in rehabbing a burningman bike.
Wheel-building with Shane. Learn how to measure a hub, find the ERD of your rim, and calculate spoke length to build your own custom wheelset.
